title: PromptRegistration
description: Prompt registry record (spec §29.9, §30.6, §30.16). Tracks identity, version, and classification of every registered prompt unit.

promptId.description: Unique identifier for this prompt unit (§29.9.1 prompt_id).

promptName.description: Human-readable name for this prompt unit (§29.9.1 prompt_name).

promptType.description: Functional category of this prompt unit (§30.16).

role.description: LLM message-format role this prompt occupies (NEXT_PASS.md examples: isSystemPrompt / isUserPrompt). See OQ-001 in OPEN_QUESTIONS.md.

linkedModule.description: Build module this prompt unit belongs to (§29.9.1 linked_module, §30.7).

linkedDecisionBlock.description: Optional decision block within the module (§29.9.1 linked_decision_block_if_any).

promptPurpose.description: Plain-English description of what this prompt unit does (§29.9.1 prompt_purpose, §30.7 purpose).

inputContractRef.description: Reference to the input contract or schema for this prompt (§29.9.1 input_contract_reference).

outputContractRef.description: Reference to the output contract or schema for this prompt (§29.9.1 output_contract_reference).

sourceSectionLinks.description: Spec section references that justify this prompt (§29.9.1 source_section_links, §30.7 linked reference sections).

promptVersion.description: Version identifier for this prompt (§29.9.1 prompt_version). A new version must not silently replace an existing active behavior (§30.14).
